prerequisites: An Invoice Ninja account, either hosted at invoicing.co or a self-hosted v5 instance.
Access to the account settings so you can generate an API token.
An API token (the value used for the connector required api_key field).

authMethods.name: API token
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single API token supplied in the required api_key field. Invoice Ninja sends this value in the X-API-TOKEN header, which is required for all v5 API requests. In v4 the header was named X-Ninja-Token.

setupSteps.title: Sign in to Invoice Ninja
setupSteps.body: Log in to your hosted account at invoicing.co or to your self-hosted Invoice Ninja v5 instance with administrator access.

setupSteps.title: Open the API Tokens page
setupSteps.body: Go to Settings, select Account Management, open the Integrations tab, then choose API Tokens.

setupSteps.title: Create a new API token
setupSteps.body: Click the button to add a new token, enter a name for it, and save. Invoice Ninja generates the token value and lists it in the API Tokens table.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Copy the generated token and paste it into the connector required api_key field. This value is sent as the X-API-TOKEN header on every API request.

sources.title: Where to find API token - Invoice Ninja Support Forum
